utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- health_coverage: required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan provides a description but does not explicitly state physical and mental coverage; it only gives a general description and a monthly cost. Lacks explicit confirmation of both physical and mental coverage details, so not fully specified.
- property_coverage: required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan has a bundled description including property but not explicit home/contents coverage details; cost provided. Not fully specified per requirement.
- travel_coverage: required 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan provides a relevant description and monthly cost. This matches the required item sufficiently (travel insurance with costs), so considered fully specified.
- additional_services: required 'any enhancement services with costs'. Plan provides a concierge service with monthly cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Plan provides current monthly cost, optimized monthly cost, and savings, but no annual breakdown. Not fully specified.
Therefore, 2 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists descriptive bundles rather than exact product names. We must match any explicitly named items to the ground-truth catalog. In property_coverage, the description explicitly includes 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (property)' and 'TravelFirst Standard Plan (travel)'. These correspond directly to items in the ground-truth with ratings 10 and 8 respectively. The other components in the final plan (Enhanced International Health Coverage, Specialized Youth Travel & Sports Protection, Family Insurance Concierge) do not match any exact product names in the ground-truth list, so only the explicitly named items can be mapped.
